title: Identify opportunities and risks in carbon farming projects
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify opportunities and risks in carbon farming projects demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify carbon farming opportunities

pcs.text: Identify potential site/s for carbon farming project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential site/s for carbon farming project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential site/s for carbon farming project.

pcs.text: Consider land type, land use, local climate and investment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider land type, land use, local climate and investment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider land type, land use, local climate and investment.

pcs.text: Consider carbon farming methods that may apply to selected site/s and associated social, cultural and economic benefits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider carbon farming methods that may apply to selected site/s and associated social, cultural and economic benefits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider carbon farming methods that may apply to selected site/s and associated social, cultural and economic benefits.

pcs.text: Determine rights to lands, eligible interest holder groups and project boundaries
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine rights to lands, eligible interest holder groups and project boundaries?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine rights to lands, eligible interest holder groups and project boundaries.

pcs.text: Investigate markets that offer carbon credits for approved carbon farming projects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate markets that offer carbon credits for approved carbon farming projects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate markets that offer carbon credits for approved carbon farming projects.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify carbon farming opportunities

elements.title: Consider feasibility of the carbon farming project

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate total costs of project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate total costs of project.

pcs.text: Consider technological systems required to monitor project and collect, collate and record relevant data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider technological systems required to monitor project and collect, collate and record relevant data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider technological systems required to monitor project and collect, collate and record relevant data.

pcs.text: Identify the management, governance and technical skills required to implement a carbon farming project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the management, governance and technical skills required to implement a carbon farming project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the management, governance and technical skills required to implement a carbon farming project.

pcs.text: Assess requirement to contract suitably qualified or experienced personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess requirement to contract suitably qualified or experienced personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess requirement to contract suitably qualified or experienced personnel.

pcs.text: Consider services that may be offered by carbon project developers, agents, aggregators and advisors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider services that may be offered by carbon project developers, agents, aggregators and advisors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider services that may be offered by carbon project developers, agents, aggregators and advisors.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify stakeholders and consultation processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify stakeholders and consultation processes.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate ongoing project costs.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Roughly estimate anticipated carbon abatement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Roughly estimate anticipated carbon abatement.

pcs.text: Investigate benefits of working with an agent or advisor who holds an Australian Financial Services Licence (AFSL) to identify financial risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate benefits of working with an agent or advisor who holds an Australian Financial Services Licence (AFSL) to identify financial risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate benefits of working with an agent or advisor who holds an Australian Financial Services Licence (AFSL) to identify financial risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess risks of working with an agent or advisor who does not hold an AFSL.
